news-global-econ.title: End of an Era: Viktor Orban Concedes Defeat in Hungarian Elections to Upstart Rival Magyar
news-global-econ.description:
Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán conceded defeat in the parliamentary elections on Sunday, bringing an end to 16 years of governance in Budapest.

news-global-econ.title: South Africa's Second-Biggest Party Elects Cape Town Mayor Hill-Lewis as Leader
news-global-econ.description:
South Africa's second-largest party, the Democratic Alliance, elected Cape Town's mayor Sunday to lead it into the 2029 national polls, stepping up its drive to take votes away from the faltering ANC.

news-global-soc.title: Pope Leo XIV to visit fastest-growing Catholic continent during 4-nation Africa trip
news-global-soc.description: Pope Leo XIV begins a four-nation African visit Monday, traveling to the fastest-growing continent for the Catholic Church on his fourth foreign trip.

news-global-soc.title: Trump details sweeping 'all or nothing' blockade of Strait of Hormuz after failed Iran talks
news-global-soc.description: In a Maria Bartiromo exclusive, Trump vows to choke off Iran's oil profits with a sweeping U.S. Navy blockade of the Strait of Hormuz region.

news-global-soc.title: Trump orders a blockade in the Strait of Hormuz as tensions with Iran soar
news-global-soc.description: Trump says the U.S. Navy will blockade the Strait of Hormuz and interdict vessels that paid tolls to Iran following a stalemate in peace talks.
